nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Mountain robin
nodes.summary: Mountain robin（Mountain robin，学名 Petroica bivittata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found sparsely throughout the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subalpine shrubland. The robin eats insects, caught in flight. Two subspecies have been noted, Petroica bivittata bivittata and Petroica bivittata caudata
